task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness Web Admin interface and log in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the Nx Witness Web Admin interface at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html, and the interface indicates a successful login (e.g., dashboard or settings page is visible).
The 'Entrance Camera' is visible in the list of devices/cameras and is actively selected.

task_completion.description: Open the authentication or credentials settings for the Entrance Camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings panel, dialog, or tab specifically for the 'Entrance Camera' is open, displaying fields for camera authentication or credentials.

task_completion.description: Enter the new username and password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The username field contains exactly 'camuser' and the password field contains text or masked characters (representing 'Cam@SecurePass2024').
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'OK' button, or a success notification/toast is visible confirming the camera settings were updated.

integrity.description: The agent used the Web Admin GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interaction occurs within a web browser navigating the Nx Witness interface, without terminal windows running curl commands or scripts to hit the REST API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Nx Witness Web Admin interface, not a text editor or notes app with the credentials typed out.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the outcome.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to alter the page DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating camera credentials in the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin interface at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html. The target camera is named 'Entrance Camera'. The new credentials to be set are username: 'camuser' and password: 'Cam@SecurePass2024'. Note that the password field may be masked (e.g., shown as dots or asterisks) during or after entry, which is acceptable as long as the username 'camuser' is clearly visible and the changes are saved.
